title: Chapter 13 - Caching and CDNs
description: Quick checks on caching headers and CDNs.

questions.prompt: Which header instructs caches how long to keep a response?

explanations.overview: Cache-Control controls caching behavior and max-age.

byOptionId.c: Correct — Cache-Control sets caching directives like max-age.

questions.prompt: What is the purpose of an ETag header?

options.label: To provide a fingerprint for a resource version

explanations.overview: ETag is a content fingerprint clients can use to check for changes.

byOptionId.a: Correct — ETag helps conditional requests and caching.

questions.prompt: What is the main purpose of a CDN?

options.label: To cache static assets closer to users to reduce latency

explanations.overview: CDNs cache and serve static content from edge locations close to users.

byOptionId.d: Correct — CDNs reduce latency and origin load by caching assets.
